title: prunus emarginata subsp. erecta
intro: Prunus emarginata subsp. erecta, also known as the antelope bitterbrush or erect bitterbrush, is a shrub native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Prunus emarginata subsp. erecta include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
